LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL - THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS INDICATES THAT THE MOTION WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 20, 2013, AND THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT OBTAIN AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME OR OTHERWISE COMPLY WITH CCP 1005. IN ADDITION, THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal - The motion is off calendar because the register of actions indicates that the motion was filed on February 20, 2013, and the moving party did not obtain an order shortening time or otherwise comply with CCP 1005. In addition, the moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of its papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
